name: Scribble: Read Aloud+ Scribbling Activity by Meghna Shirish Iyer
description: Come enjoy an interactive storytelling session of the book  SCRIBBLE   by its author Meghna Shirish Iyer. The session will also include fun scribbling activities to spark their creativity. Here are all the event details: Date: 7th March, Saturday Time: 11 AM Venue: Champaca Bookstore, Indiranagar. Price: INR 199 (The amount will be redeemable against any book purchase.) CLICK HERE  to register. About the Book:  SCRIBBLE   is a book on the undiluted joys of scribbling and doodling. The book will transport you to a time when the young and the old embrace the freedom to splash colours everywhere, transforming the world into a vibrant tapestry of joy and expression. About the Author: Meghna Shirish  is an author, artist, and professional photographer who treats color like it's her lifeline. Her book was honored with the Braw Amazing Bookshelf Shelf at Bologna Ragazzi Award 2025. If she had her way, she'd transform the entire city into a canvas of vibrant scribbles!  Seats are limited, to reserve your spot please  CLICK HERE
